articles.author: Paul Tassi
articles.title: ‘GTA 6’ Should Cost $80 So The Industry Can Raise Prices, Says Bank Of America - Forbes
articles.description: GTA 6 has not yet committed to a price, but Bank of America is saying they should make it $80 so then the rest of the industry can also price that high.
articles.content: There have been debates over the last few years that, after a jump in standard pricing of games from $60 to $70, they should once again be nudged up to $80. After a number of false starts, only one c… [+2837 chars]

articles.author: Jessica Hall
articles.title: Get ready to work for 60 years — as living to 100 becomes the new norm - MarketWatch
articles.description: America’s older population is expected to expand in the coming years. That will change how we work, save and live.
articles.content:
A 100-year lifespan will bring many changes, most notably a 60-year career to fund it. But it will also change how society views aging, as the number of older Americans soars. 
Many of todays childr… [+350 chars]
